task_completion.description: The agent successfully loaded the abdominal CT scan into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application window is open and the CT volume is visible in the slice viewers (Red, Yellow, or Green windows).

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the axial slice showing the aortic bifurcation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The axial view (Red slice) shows the abdominal aorta splitting into two distinct circular vessels (common iliac arteries) or an inverted 'Y' shape.

task_completion.description: A fiducial marker was placed at the bifurcation point using the Markups module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A control point or fiducial marker (e.g., labeled 'F-1') is visible on the slice view exactly where the aorta divides, or is listed in the Markups module panel.

task_completion.description: The agent measured the aortic diameter proximal to the bifurcation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler line or measurement tool is visible across the aorta cross-section in the slice view, or the agent is interacting with the Ruler/Measurement module.

task_completion.description: The agent generated a report containing the vertebral level and diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of a JSON file is displayed (e.g., via terminal 'cat' or text editor), showing keys like 'vertebral_level' (e.g., 'L4') and 'terminal_diameter_mm'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the fiducial marker and the report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or terminal listing ('ls') shows 'bifurcation_marker.mrk.json' and 'bifurcation_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to perform tasks rather than purely programmatic scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Slicer toolbars, modules (Markups), and slice views.

integrity.description: The reported diameter is derived from an actual measurement tool interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen placing a ruler or measurement line on the image before the value appears in the report; the value is not magically guessed.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write a JSON file without inspecting the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent spent time navigating the CT volume and placing markers before generating the final report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The abdominal aorta is the large central artery (segmentation label 10 in AMOS). The bifurcation is the point where this single vessel splits into two iliac arteries as you scroll inferiorly (towards feet). The spine vertebral levels are ordered T12, L1, L2, L3, L4, L5, S1.
